text_block_list.text:
During training, Smart Falcon comes up to me out
of breath...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Trainer... What... should I... do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My fatigue isn't clearing up one bit... There's no
way I can train cute like this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... My muscles need to be cute and healthy if
I want to be a top Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But when I'm this worn out, all I can do is train
tired!

She seems to be exhausted... Maybe I need to
revise her race schedule.
